hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
